injuries.name: Ernie Clement
injuries.detail: Clement is not in the lineup for Friday's game against the Cubs.

injuries.name: Shane Bieber
injuries.detail: Blue Jays manager John Schneider said Friday that "all signs point towards" Bieber (elbow) making his season debut Monday against the Astros, Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca reports.

injuries.name: Daulton Varsho
injuries.detail: Blue Jays manager John Schneider said Thursday that Varsho (wrist) could be activated from the 10-day injured list when first eligible Saturday, but he will "have to do a lot today and tomorrow" in order to make that happen, Shi Davidi of Sportsnet.ca reports.

injuries.name: Anthony Santander
injuries.detail: Santander (shoulder) could resume hitting within the next week, Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca reports.

injuries.name: Lenyn Sosa
injuries.detail: Sosa (wrist) could begin a rehab assignment next week, Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca reports.

injuries.name: Addison Barger
injuries.detail: Barger (elbow) might not begin a rehab assignment until early next week, Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca reports.

injuries.name: Yimi Garcia
injuries.detail: Garcia (elbow) struck out the side Tuesday for Triple-A Buffalo and is scheduled for another rehab outing Thursday, reports Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca.

injuries.name: Max Scherzer
injuries.detail: The Blue Jays placed Scherzer on the 15-day injured list Wednesday due to back spasms.

injuries.name: Lazaro Estrada
injuries.detail: Estrada (shoulder) struck out three over three perfect innings of relief Sunday in a rehab appearance with Triple-A Buffalo.

injuries.name: Joe Mantiply
injuries.detail: Mantiply will undergo arthroscopic surgery to repair some damage in his left knee, Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca reports.

injuries.name: Jose Berrios
injuries.detail: Blue Jays manager John Schneider said that Berrios underwent full Tommy John surgery Wednesday in addition to having a stress fracture repaired, Hazel Mae of Sportsnet reports.

injuries.name: Geovanny Jesus Planchart
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Chay Yeager
injuries.detail: Yeager will undergo season-ending UCL surgery on his right elbow Wednesday, Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca reports.

injuries.name: Cody Ponce
injuries.detail: Ponce underwent surgery Friday to repair the ACL in his right knee, Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca reports.

injuries.name: Bowden Francis
injuries.detail: The Blue Jays placed Francis (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Wednesday.

injuries.name: Matthew Boyd
injuries.detail: Boyd (knee/shoulder) will begin a rehab assignment Saturday, Jared Wyllys of AllCHGO.com reports.

injuries.name: Edward Cabrera
injuries.detail: Manager Craig Counsell said Wednesday that Cabrera's right hand is feeling better, and he's expected to be on a normal schedule leading up to his next start, Jared Wyllys of AllCHGO.com reports.

injuries.name: Daniel Palencia
injuries.detail: Palencia (2-1) worked around a walk to toss a scoreless inning of relief and earn the win in Monday's 5-4 victory over the Rockies. He struck out three.

injuries.name: Justin Steele
injuries.detail: Steele will throw plyo balls for the next week and then progress to throwing a baseball, Meghan Montemurro of the Chicago Tribune reports.

injuries.name: Jaxon Wiggins
injuries.detail: The Cubs announced Wednesday that Wiggins (elbow) has resumed throwing bullpen sessions and facing hitters at the organization's complex in Arizona and could soon be ready to pitch in games, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jameson Taillon
injuries.detail: Taillon (hamstring) is expected to be sidelined until after the All-Star break, Vinnie Duber of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.

injuries.name: Hunter Harvey
injuries.detail: The Cubs moved Harvey (triceps) from the 15-day IL to the 60-day IL on Sunday.

injuries.name: Brandon Birdsell
injuries.detail: Birdsell (elbow) will miss the entire 2026 season, Jim Callis of MLB Pipeline reports.

injuries.name: Jeff Brigham
injuries.detail: Brigham was placed on the 7-day injured list at Triple-A St. Paul, retroactive to April 6, with a left oblique strain, TwinsDaily.com reports.

injuries.name: Porter Hodge
injuries.detail: The Cubs transferred Hodge (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Friday, Taylor McGregor of Marquee Sports Network reports.

injuries.name: Riley Martin
injuries.detail: Martin has been diagnosed with flexor strain in his left elbow and is expected to miss eight weeks, Taylor McGregor of Marquee Sports Network reports.

injuries.name: Shelby Miller
injuries.detail: The Cubs placed Miller (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Sunday.

injuries.name: Cade Horton
injuries.detail: The Cubs transferred Horton (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Saturday, Andy Martinez of Marquee Sports Network reports.

injuries.name: Tyler Austin
injuries.detail: The Cubs placed Austin (knee) on the 60-day injured list Tuesday.

injuries.name: Everson Pereira
injuries.detail: The White Sox activated Pereira (pectoral) from the 10-day injured list Thursday.

injuries.name: Sean Newcomb
injuries.detail: Newcomb notched a save against the Royals on Thursday, allowing one hit and striking out one batter over two scoreless innings.

injuries.name: Hagen Smith
injuries.detail: Smith will be shut down for two weeks after being diagnosed with a left shoulder impingement, James Fegan of SoxMachine.com reports.

injuries.name: Kyle Teel
injuries.detail: Teel (knee/hamstring) will start a minor-league rehab assignment with Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday, James Fegan of SoxMachine.com reports.

injuries.name: Noah Schultz
injuries.detail: Schultz (knee) will begin a minor-league rehab assignment with Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday, James Fegan of SoxMachine.com reports.

injuries.name: Jordan Hicks
injuries.detail: Hicks (lat) will begin a rehab assignment with Triple-A Charlotte on Saturday, James Fegan of SoxMachine.com reports.

injuries.name: Tim Elko
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Tyler Gilbert
injuries.detail: The White Sox placed Gilbert on the 15-day injured list Wednesday with a left shoulder impingement.

injuries.name: Austin Hays
injuries.detail: Hays has been pulled off his rehab assignment at Triple-A Charlotte due to a recurrence of left calf soreness, Scott Merkin of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Munetaka Murakami
injuries.detail: White Sox manager Will Venable said Monday that Murakami (hamstring) stayed back in Chicago during the team's road trip and was given a platelet-rich plasma injection, James Fegan of SoxMachine.com reports.

injuries.name: Jordan Leasure
injuries.detail: Leasure (forearm) said Friday that he will be shut down from throwing for four weeks, James Fegan of SoxMachine.com reports.

injuries.name: Ky Bush
injuries.detail: Bush (elbow) had a setback in his recovery from Tommy John surgery and is unlikely to return until the second half of the season, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Drew Thorpe
injuries.detail: Thorpe (elbow) recently underwent an appendectomy but has resumed throwing, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Prelander Berroa
injuries.detail: Berroa is dealing with right elbow inflammation and will have his rehab stint paused, James Fegan of SoxMachine.com reports.

injuries.name: Mike Vasil
injuries.detail: The White Sox transferred Vasil (elbow) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Tuesday.

injuries.name: Tanner Murray
injuries.detail: The White Sox transferred Murray (shoulder) to the 60-day injured list Monday.

injuries.name: Mason Adams
injuries.detail: The White Sox announced that Adams underwent successful Tommy John surgery Wednesday, Scott Merkin of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Brooks Baldwin
injuries.detail: The White Sox transferred Baldwin (elbow) from the 10-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Wednesday.

injuries.name: Wenceel Perez
injuries.detail: Perez is likely unavailable off the bench for Wednesday's game in Houston after being struck in the face by a plyometric band in the weight room Tuesday, Chris McCosky of The Detroit News reports.

injuries.name: Gleyber Torres
injuries.detail: Torres (side) remains out of the lineup for Wednesday's contest in Houston.

injuries.name: Justin Verlander
injuries.detail: Verlander (hip) will return from the injured list to start Sunday's game against the White Sox, Chris McCosky of The Detroit News reports.

injuries.name: Jack Flaherty
injuries.detail: The Tigers placed Flaherty on the 15-day injured list Saturday with a left peroneal strain.

injuries.name: Javier Baez
injuries.detail: The Tigers transferred Baez (ankle) to the 60-day injured list Thursday, Cody Stavenhagen of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Burch Smith
injuries.detail: Smith (shoulder) threw a bullpen session Tuesday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Trey Sweeney
injuries.detail: Sweeney will undergo season-ending shoulder surgery this week, Cody Stavenhagen of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Jackson Jobe
injuries.detail: Tigers manager A.J. Hinch said Tuesday that Jobe (elbow) is expected to resume facing hitters in live batting practice "in a few weeks," Chris McCosky of The Detroit News reports.

injuries.name: Brant Hurter
injuries.detail: The Tigers placed Hurter on the 15-day injured list Sunday due to lumbar spine inflammation.

injuries.name: Bailey Horn
injuries.detail: Horn (elbow) began a throwing progression May 14, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Reese Olson
injuries.detail: The Tigers placed Olson on the 60-day injured list Tuesday after he underwent a right shoulder labral repair Feb. 2 that will result in him missing the 2026 season.

injuries.name: Parker Meadows
injuries.detail: Tigers manager A.J. Hinch said that Meadows underwent surgery Tuesday to repair a left radius fracture and will be sidelined "multiple months," Jason Beck of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Josue Briceno
injuries.detail: Briceno said Friday that he expects to be sidelined a few months after having surgery Wednesday to repair a tendon in his right wrist, Evan Petzold of the Detroit Free Press reports.

injuries.name: Hunter Greene
injuries.detail: Greene (elbow) struck out six over four scoreless frames Thursday in his first rehab start with the Reds' Arizona Complex League affiliate.

injuries.name: Ke'Bryan Hayes
injuries.detail: Hayes (back) has begun hitting at the Reds' training facility in Arizona, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Emilio Pagan
injuries.detail: Pagan (hamstring) threw a bullpen session Tuesday and is scheduled to pitch in a simulated game/live batting practice session at Yankee Stadium on Friday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Pierce Johnson
injuries.detail: Johnson (elbow) is scheduled to begin a rehab assignment with Triple-A Louisville on Thursday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Elly De La Cruz
injuries.detail: De La Cruz (hamstring) is scheduled to begin running Tuesday and Wednesday, and he will begin a rehab assignment Friday with Triple-A Gwinnett, C. Trent Rosecrans of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Graham Ashcraft
injuries.detail: Ashcraft (elbow) received a platelet-rich plasma injection Tuesday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Connor Burns
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Brandon Williamson
injuries.detail: The Reds transferred Williamson (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Wednesday.

injuries.name: Carson Spiers
injuries.detail: The Reds re-signed Spiers (elbow) to a minor-league contract with an invitation to spring training Monday.

injuries.name: Austin Wells
injuries.detail: Wells (head) went 2-for-5 with two homers and three total RBI in a minor-league rehab appearance with Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Thursday.

injuries.name: Jazz Chisholm Jr.
injuries.detail: Chisholm (groin) exited Thursday's contest against the White Sox in the fourth inning, Gary Phillips of the New York Daily News reports.

injuries.name: Trent Grisham
injuries.detail: Yankees manager Aaron Boone said Tuesday that Grisham has  been diagnosed with a "moderate" right hamstring strain, Brendan Kuty of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Giancarlo Stanton
injuries.detail: The Yankees announced that Stanton (calf) reinjured his calf and will have a slow week of activities, Bryan Hoch of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Max Fried
injuries.detail: Yankees manager Aaron Boone said Friday that Fried (elbow) will throw off a mound Saturday, Gary Phillips of the New York Daily News reports.

injuries.name: Clarke Schmidt
injuries.detail: Schmidt (elbow) has been "feeling great" during recent mound sessions and could start throwing to hitters by the end of June, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Eric Reyzelman
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Aaron Judge
injuries.detail: The Yankees announced Thursday that Judge has a stress fracture of his first rib on his right side and will be sidelined for 4-to-6 weeks before being re-evaluated, Bryan Hoch of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Travis MacGregor
injuries.detail: MacGregor underwent Tommy John surgery last September and will miss the entire 2019 season, Jonathan Mayo of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Cade Cavalli
injuries.detail: Cavalli was scratched from his scheduled start against the Rays on Friday due to an illness.

injuries.name: Jarlin Susana
injuries.detail: Susana threw from a mound this week for the first time since undergoing lat surgery last September, Jessica Camerato of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: DJ Herz
injuries.detail: Herz (elbow) struck out four batters over three scoreless innings in his second rehab start Thursday in the rookie-level Florida Complex League.

injuries.name: Ken Waldichuk
injuries.detail: Waldichuk (elbow) underwent Tommy John surgery and an internal brace procedure April 21 and is hopeful to return to game action at some point early in the 2027 season, Mark Zuckerman of MASNSports.com reports.

injuries.name: Trevor Williams
injuries.detail: Williams (elbow) threw a simulated game at Nationals Park ahead of Tuesday's loss to the Marlins, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jake Irvin
injuries.detail: Nationals manager Blake Butera said Monday that Irvin (shoulder) remains shut down from throwing, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.

injuries.name: Max Kranick
injuries.detail: The Nationals transferred Kranick (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Monday.

injuries.name: Tyler Stuart
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Josiah Gray
injuries.detail: Gray (elbow) has resumed a throwing program, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.

injuries.name: Tyler Baum
injuries.detail: Baum has not pitched this year due an undisclosed injury.

injuries.name: Travis Sykora
injuries.detail: Sykora will undergo a UCL reconstruction on his right elbow in two weeks, Andrew Golden of The Washington Post reports.

injuries.name: Gavin Lux
injuries.detail: Lux (shoulder) is scheduled to take live batting practice against teammate Craig Kimbrel (wrist) on Tuesday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.

injuries.name: Jonathan Heasley
injuries.detail: Heasley was returned to the major-league roster and placed on the 15-day injured list Tuesday with a right elbow stress reaction.

injuries.name: Manuel Rodriguez
injuries.detail: Rodriguez (elbow) has no timetable to progress to facing live hitters, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Steven Wilson
injuries.detail: The Rays hope Wilson (back) will be able to start bullpen sessions June 8, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Edwin Uceta
injuries.detail: Manager Kevin Cash said Friday that Uceta (shoulder) suffered a setback and received a PRP injection, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.

injuries.name: Michael Grove
injuries.detail: Grove (shoulder) started a rehab assignment with the Florida Complex League Rays on Saturday.

injuries.name: Jesse Scholtens
injuries.detail: Scholtens was charged with a blown save and dropped to 5-3 on the season in Monday's 9-7 loss to the Orioles in 13 innings after yielding five runs (three earned) on four hits across 1.1 frames. He struck out one batter.

injuries.name: Jake Fraley
injuries.detail: Rays manager Kevin Cash said Monday that Fraley (hernia) will require surgery and will face a recovery timeline of 6-to-8 weeks, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.

injuries.name: Austin Vernon
injuries.detail: The Rays have shut Vernon down from throwing due to right elbow soreness, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Ryan Pepiot
injuries.detail: Pepiot will undergo surgery on his right hip May 13 and miss the rest of the 2026 season, Ryan Bass of Rays.tv reports.

injuries.name: Alfredo Zarraga
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Heliot Ramos
injuries.detail: Ramos (quadriceps) went 1-for-5 with a walk and a run scored in Triple-A Sacramento's 9-6 win over Oklahoma City on Wednesday.

injuries.name: Tyler Mahle
injuries.detail: Mahle (hamstring) allowed one earned run on one hit and five walks while striking out three over three innings in Triple-A Sacramento's 10-1 win over Oklahoma City on Tuesday.

injuries.name: Jason Foley
injuries.detail: Foley (shoulder) struck out two over a scoreless inning in a rehab appearance with Triple-A Sacramento on Friday.

injuries.name: Harrison Bader
injuries.detail: Bader met with Dr. Robert Anderson on June 5 and received a stem-cell injection to address plantar fasciitis in his left foot, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Keaton Winn
injuries.detail: The Giants placed Winn on the 15-day injured list Sunday due to a right elbow strain.

injuries.name: Joel Peguero
injuries.detail: The Giants placed Peguero on the 60-day injured list Monday due to a left hamstring strain, John Shea of the San Francisco Chronicle reports.

injuries.name: Jared Oliva
injuries.detail: Oliva (wrist) started at designated hitter and went 2-for-2 with two stolen bases, a double, an RBI and a run scored in Triple-A Sacramento's 6-4 loss to Reno on Saturday.

injuries.name: Rowan Wick
injuries.detail: The Giants placed Wick (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Sunday, Justice delos Santos of The San Jose Mercury News reports.

injuries.name: Hayden Birdsong
injuries.detail: Birdsong underwent successful UCL reconstruction surgery on his right elbow Wednesday, Susan Slusser of the San Francisco Chronicle reports.

injuries.name: Randy Rodriguez
injuries.detail: The Giants placed Rodriguez (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Tuesday, Justice delos Santos of The San Jose Mercury News reports.

injuries.name: Jose Butto
injuries.detail: The Giants transferred Butto (arm) to the 60-day injured list Tuesday.

injuries.name: Eury Perez
injuries.detail: Perez (thigh) gave up one run on three hits over 3.2 innings in a rehab start for Triple-A Jacksonville on Thursday. He struck out five without walking a batter.

injuries.name: Janson Junk
injuries.detail: Junk (shin) was able to throw a light bullpen session earlier this week and could throw a higher-intensity side session in the coming days, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Griffin Conine
injuries.detail: Conine (hamstring) will begin a rehab assignment with Triple-A Jacksonville on Tuesday, Stephen Strom of Marlins Radio Network reports.

injuries.name: Thomas White
injuries.detail: White was diagnosed with a left shoulder capsular sprain Friday and is expected to miss the rest of the season, Isaac Azout of FishOnFirst.com reports.

injuries.name: Josh Ekness
injuries.detail: Marlins manager Clayton McCullough said Monday that Ekness is expected to miss approximately six weeks due to a right calf strain, Kyle Sielaff of Marlins.tv reports.

injuries.name: Andrew Nardi
injuries.detail: The Marlins transferred Nardi (ribcage) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Monday.

injuries.name: Robby Snelling
injuries.detail: Snelling underwent internal brace surgery Friday to repair a torn UCL in his left elbow.

injuries.name: Ronny Henriquez
injuries.detail: The Marlins placed Henriquez (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Thursday.

injuries.name: Jesus Tinoco
injuries.detail: The Marlins re-signed Tinoco (elbow) to a minor-league contract Jan. 5.

injuries.name: Adam Mazur
injuries.detail: The Marlins placed Mazur (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Wednesday.

injuries.name: Quinn Priester
injuries.detail: Priester will undergo thoracic outlet compression surgery on Monday and is expected to be sidelined 8-to-10 months, Curt Hogg of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.

injuries.name: Brandon Sproat
injuries.detail: Manager Pat Murphy said after Wednesday's win over Cleveland that Sproat's hamstring cramps are minor and won't impact his next scheduled start, Adam McCalvy of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Brandon Woodruff
injuries.detail: Woodruff (shoulder) allowed three runs over 5.1 innings while notching six strikeouts in a rehab start with High-A Wisconsin on Tuesday.

injuries.name: Coleman Crow
injuries.detail: Crow said Sunday that an MRI on his right forearm revealed a mild flexor strain, Adam McCalvy of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: DL Hall
injuries.detail: Hall received an anti-inflammatory injection for his left pectoral strain Friday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Brandon Lockridge
injuries.detail: Lockridge received a platelet-rich plasma injection in his right knee Thursday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jared Koenig
injuries.detail: Koenig (elbow) transferred his rehab assignment to Triple-A Nashville on Tuesday and could be activated from the injured list in about a week, Todd Rosiak of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.

injuries.name: Brian Fitzpatrick
injuries.detail: Fitzpatrick (elbow) has been diagnosed with a left UCL strain and will get a second opinion to determine if he needs Tommy John surgery, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Carlos Rodriguez
injuries.detail: The Brewers placed Rodriguez on the 15-day injured list Monday due to a right shoulder impingement, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Logan Henderson
injuries.detail: Henderson received an injection in his back Tuesday, Adam McCalvy of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Rob Zastryzny
injuries.detail: The Brewers reinstated Zastrzyny (shoulder/ribs) from the 60-day injured list Sunday.

injuries.name: Angel Zerpa
injuries.detail: The Brewers transferred Zerpa (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Sunday.

injuries.name: Spencer Strider
injuries.detail: Atlanta  transferred Strider (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Wednesday.

injuries.name: Michael Harris II
injuries.detail: Harris (back) is not in the lineup for Wednesday's game against San Francisco.

injuries.name: Ronald Acuna Jr.
injuries.detail: Atlanta manager Walt Weiss said Wednesday that Acuna (hamstring) is a "long way" from returning from the 10-day injured list, Mark Bowman of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Tyler Kinley
injuries.detail: Kinley (4-2) picked up the win over the Nationals on Friday, striking out two in a perfect 11th inning.

injuries.name: Sean Murphy
injuries.detail: Murphy had the cast on his left hand removed Tuesday and is now wearing a splint to protect his fractured middle finger, Grant McAuley of the Marietta Daily Journal reprots.

injuries.name: Spencer Schwellenbach
injuries.detail: Schwellenbach (elbow) has begun throwing on flat ground, Chad Bishop of The Atlanta Journal-Constitution reports.

injuries.name: AJ Smith-Shawver
injuries.detail: Manager Walt Weiss said Friday that Smith-Shawver (elbow) has been throwing bullpen sessions, and the next step in his rehab is to face live hitters, Grant McAuley of the Marietta Daily Journal reports.

injuries.name: Kyle Farmer
injuries.detail: Farmer went 1-for-3 with a double, a run scored and two RBI in Sunday's rout of the Guardians.

injuries.name: Joe Jimenez
injuries.detail: Atlanta manager Walt Weiss revealed Wednesday that Jimenez underwent another surgery on his left knee 3-to-4 weeks ago, Grant McAuley of the Marietta Daily Journal reports.

injuries.name: Danny Young
injuries.detail: Atlanta transferred Young (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Saturday.

injuries.name: Jurickson Profar
injuries.detail: Profar will miss the full 2026 season after the appeal of his 162-game PED suspension was denied Thursday, Jeff Passan of ESPN.com reports.

injuries.name: Joey Wentz
injuries.detail: Atlanta placed Wentz (knee) on the 60-day injured list Tuesday.

injuries.name: Ron Marinaccio
injuries.detail: Marinaccio was suspended three games by Major League Baseball for intentionally hitting Gunnar Henderson with a pitch during Saturday's game versus the Orioles, Kevin Acee of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.

injuries.name: Mason Miller
injuries.detail: Miller secured the save Sunday against the Orioles, throwing 1.1 clean innings. He struck out three.

injuries.name: Matt Waldron
injuries.detail: Waldron (forearm) made his first rehab appearance with Triple-A El Paso on Sunday, tossing 2.1 scoreless innings.

injuries.name: Freddy Fermin
injuries.detail: The Padres placed Fermin (concussion) on the 7-day injured list Sunday.

injuries.name: Nick Pivetta
injuries.detail: Pivetta (forearm) progressed to throwing from 90 feet with some intensity June 10, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Luis Campusano
injuries.detail: Campusano (toe) continues to rehab in Arizona but hasn't yet been scheduled for a minor-league rehab assignment, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Miguel Andujar
injuries.detail: Andujar (hamstring) remains out of the lineup for Wednesday's game against the Reds.

injuries.name: Joe Musgrove
injuries.detail: Musgrove (elbow) started playing catch in late May, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: German Marquez
injuries.detail: Marquez (forearm) tossed four scoreless innings for Triple-A El Paso on Sunday, allowing one hit and issuing one walk while striking out two batters.

injuries.name: Jake Cronenworth
injuries.detail: Cronenworth (concussion) has been participating in light baseball activities and is "ramping up," per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Ramon Laureano
injuries.detail: Laureano underwent surgery Friday to repair his torn right labrum, Kevin Acee of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.

injuries.name: Jeremiah Estrada
injuries.detail: Estrada (2-2) picked up the loss after giving up the eventual game-winning run in a 3-2 loss to Philadelphia on Tuesday.

injuries.name: Yu Darvish
injuries.detail: Darvish (elbow) revealed Tuesday in a social media post that he has resumed playing catch.

injuries.name: Bryan Hoeing
injuries.detail: The Padres transferred Hoeing (elbow) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Wednesday.

injuries.name: Sebastian Walcott
injuries.detail: Walcott (elbow) will begin to ramp up his activity soon and is still on track for a late-July or early-August return to a minor-league affiliate, Kennedi Landry of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Corey Seager
injuries.detail: The Rangers placed Seager on the 7-day concussion injured list Monday, Evan Grant of The Dallas Morning News reports.

injuries.name: Michael Helman
injuries.detail: The Rangers placed Helman (hand) on the 10-day injured list Sunday.

injuries.name: Evan Carter
injuries.detail: The Rangers placed Carter (oblique) on the 10-day injured list Saturday.

injuries.name: Jalen Beeks
injuries.detail: Beeks (2-1) earned the win in relief Saturday against the Cubs after tossing 1.1 scoreless innings. He struck out one with no hits or walks allowed.

injuries.name: Danny Jansen
injuries.detail: Jansen is not in the Rangers' starting lineup against the Guardians on Friday.

injuries.name: Jordan Montgomery
injuries.detail: Montgomery (elbow) threw a 20-pitch live batting practice session Wednesday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Chris Martin
injuries.detail: The Rangers placed Martin on the 15-day injured list Monday with a right shoulder impingement.

injuries.name: Robert Garcia
injuries.detail: The Rangers transferred Garcia (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Monday.

injuries.name: Carter Baumler
injuries.detail: Baumler (intercostal) has been shut down from his rehab assignment, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Cody Bradford
injuries.detail: Bradford (elbow) began throwing from 60 feet during the Rangers' most recent homestand, MLB.com reports

injuries.name: Declan Cronin
injuries.detail: Cronin (elbow) signed a two-year, minor-league contract with the Rangers on Tuesday, Bob Nightengale of USA Today reports.

injuries.name: Nabil Crismatt
injuries.detail: Crismatt will undergo surgery to repair a torn UCL in his right elbow, Evan Grant of The Dallas Morning News reports.

injuries.name: Erik Sabrowski
injuries.detail: Sabrowski (elbow) allowed two unearned runs and one walk while striking out two over a hitless two-thirds of an inning for Double-A Akron on Wednesday.

injuries.name: Chase DeLauter
injuries.detail: The Guardians placed DeLauter (rib) on the 10-day injured list Wednesday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Tanner Burns
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Jose Ramirez
injuries.detail: Ramirez underwent surgery to address the hamate bone fracture in his left hand Tuesday and is expected to be sidelined 5-to-7 weeks, Zack Meisel of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Angel Martinez
injuries.detail: Martinez (foot) will be placed on the 10-day injured list Tuesday, reports Cade Cracas of Sports Illustrated.

injuries.name: Carlos Hernandez
injuries.detail: Hernandez (shoulder) began his rehab assignment with Triple-A Omaha on Friday.

injuries.name: Cristian Javier
injuries.detail: Astros manager Joe Espada said Wednesday that Javier (shoulder) will make a fourth minor-league rehab start before returning from the 60-day injured list, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Braden Shewmake
injuries.detail: The Astros announced Monday that Shewmake (adductor) has taken part in baseball activity and is working his way through a running progression at the team's facility in Florida, Matt Kawahara of the Houston Chronicle reports.

injuries.name: Lance McCullers Jr.
injuries.detail: Astros manager Joe Espada said Saturday that McCullers (shoulder) has resumed throwing off a mound, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Ronel Blanco
injuries.detail: Blanco (elbow) tossed 40 pitches in a simulated game Saturday and will soon start a rehab stint in the Florida Complex League, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: LaMonte Wade Jr.
injuries.detail: Wade left Monday's game against the Angels with right hamstring soreness, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Nick Allen
injuries.detail: Allen was removed from Sunday's game against the Athletics due to left hamstring discomfort.

injuries.name: Brandon Walter
injuries.detail: The Astros announced Friday that Walter (elbow) is in the midst of a throwing progression at the team's complex in West Palm Beach, Fla., Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Bennett Sousa
injuries.detail: The Astros announced Friday that Sousa (elbow) has begun a throwing progression, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Carlos Correa
injuries.detail: Correa is scheduled to undergo surgery Monday in Houston to repair the tendon in his left ankle, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Hayden Wesneski
injuries.detail: Wesneski (elbow) has progressed to throwing live batting practice this week, Matt Kawahara of the Houston Chronicle reports.

injuries.name: Walker Janek
injuries.detail: Double-A Corpus Christi placed Janek on its 7-day injured list Sunday due to an unspecified injury.

injuries.name: Sem Robberse
injuries.detail: Robberse (elbow) has been sent to the Cardinals' Florida Complex League affiliate to begin a rehab assignment.

injuries.name: Ryan Fernandez
injuries.detail: Fernandez (back) is on track to begin a rehab assignment with Triple-A Memphis on Friday, Jeff Jones of the Belleville News-Democrat reports.

injuries.name: Ramon Urias
injuries.detail: Urias (elbow) returned to St. Louis to undergo an examination on his left elbow, Jeff Jones of the Belleville News-Democrat reports.

injuries.name: Packy Naughton
injuries.detail: Naughton will undergo surgery next month to repair the damaged UCL in his left elbow, Derrick Goold of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.

injuries.name: Victor Santos
injuries.detail: The Red Sox traded Santos (undisclosed) and Nick Robertson to the Cardinals on Friday in exchange for Tyler O'Neill (foot), Alex Speier of The Boston Globe reports.

injuries.name: Ixan Henderson
injuries.detail: Henderson (elbow) is starting the season on the 60-day injured list at Triple-A Memphis.

injuries.name: Zack Thompson
injuries.detail: The Cardinals reassigned Thompson (shoulder) to minor-league camp Monday.

injuries.name: Bobby Witt Jr.
injuries.detail: Witt went 3-for-4 with a walk, a run scored, an RBI and a stolen base in Tuesday's 6-4 loss to the Nationals.

injuries.name: Maikel Garcia
injuries.detail: Garcia (hand) remains out of the lineup for Thursday's game versus the Cardinals.

injuries.name: Nick Mears
injuries.detail: Mears (shoulder) threw a bullpen Tuesday and could go on a rehab assignment soon, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Cole Ragans
injuries.detail: The Royals transferred Ragans (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Wednesday.

injuries.name: Carlos Estevez
injuries.detail: The Royals transferred Estevez (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Monday.

injuries.name: Kris Bubic
injuries.detail: Royals manager Matt Quatraro said Sunday that Bubic underwent another MRI that showed nothing structurally wrong with his left elbow or shoulder, Joel Goldberg of Bally Sports Kansas City reports.

injuries.name: Vinnie Pasquantino
injuries.detail: Royals manager Matt Quatraro said that Pasquantino underwent surgery Sunday to remove a fractured hamate bone in his right hand and will face a recovery timeline of roughly 4-6 weeks, Joel Goldberg of Bally Sports Kansas City reports.

injuries.name: Kyle Isbel
injuries.detail: Isbel has been diagnosed with a Grade 3 tear of a portion of his left plantar fasciitis.

injuries.name: Jonathan India
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: James McArthur
injuries.detail: McArthur (elbow) underwent surgery Friday to help combat continued soreness and inflammation, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Anthony Simonelli
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Javier Vaz
injuries.detail: Vaz (fingers) has produced a .238/.304/.262 slash line with zero home runs and three stolen bases in 10 games since being activated from Double-A Northwest Arkansas' 7-day injured list April 22.

injuries.name: Tyson Guerrero
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Alec Marsh
injuries.detail: The Royals placed Marsh (shoulder) on the 60-day injured list Thursday.

injuries.name: Oneil Cruz
injuries.detail: Pirates general manager Ben Cherington said Sunday that Cruz (hand) is facing an estimated recovery timeline of 4-6 weeks, Danny Demilio of PittsburghBaseballNow.com reports.

injuries.name: Konnor Griffin
injuries.detail: Griffin will report to the Pirates' facility in Bradenton, Fla. during the upcoming week to continue rehab for his right forearm strain, Aidan Stepansky of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Wilber Dotel
injuries.detail: The Pirates recalled Dotel from Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.

injuries.name: Anthony Solometo
injuries.detail: Solometo underwent left shoulder labrum surgery and is expected to be sidelined until at least April 2027, Mark Chiarelli of Baseball America reports.

injuries.name: Chris Devenski
injuries.detail: Devenski (illness) was transferred from the 15-day IL to the 60-day IL on Sunday.

injuries.name: Oddanier Mosqueda
injuries.detail: Mosqueda will not throw for a couple weeks due to left forearm inflammation, Kevin Gorman of TribLive.com reports.

injuries.name: Mike Clevinger
injuries.detail: Clevinger is expected to be sidelined for around six weeks after being diagnosed with an MCL sprain in his right knee, Jason Mackey of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Sean Sullivan
injuries.detail: Pirates director of sports medicine Todd Tomczyk said Wednesday that Sullivan is battling right elbow soreness, Andrew Destin of the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette reports.

injuries.name: Brenton Doyle
injuries.detail: Doyle (oblique) worked in the batting cage Monday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jordan Beck
injuries.detail: Beck (hamstring) stretched and did running drills prior to Tuesday's game against the Cubs, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Mickey Moniak
injuries.detail: Moniak (ankle) will begin a rehab assignment with Triple-A Albuquerque on Thursday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Chase Dollander
injuries.detail: Rockies manager Warren Schaeffer said Friday that Dollander will likely undergo surgery to repair the UCL in his right elbow, Kevin Henry of The Denver Gazette reports.

injuries.name: Tanner Gordon
injuries.detail: Gordon (0-1) took the loss Sunday, allowing four runs on six hits and a walk over three-plus innings against San Francisco. He struck out two.

injuries.name: Welinton Herrera
injuries.detail: Rockies manager Warren Schaeffer announced Monday that Herrera (elbow) has been diagnosed with a torn UCL and will miss the remainder of the season, Jack Janes of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: McCade Brown
injuries.detail: Brown (shoulder) had been scheduled to throw a live bullpen session this weekend, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jose Quintana
injuries.detail: The Rockies placed Quintana on the 15-day injured list Monday with a left elbow sprain.

injuries.name: RJ Petit
injuries.detail: The Rockies transferred Petit (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Thursday, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Brayan Castillo
injuries.detail: The Rockies announced Monday that Castillo is dealing with right lat tightness and has been shut down from throwing while undergoing treatment for the injury, TheDNVR.com reports.

injuries.name: Pierson Ohl
injuries.detail: The Rockies placed Ohl (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Wednesday.

injuries.name: Kris Bryant
injuries.detail: Bryant said Tuesday that the ongoing pain in his back continues to prevent him from participating in baseball activities, though he's still consulting with doctors and trainers for potential rehab options, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Case Williams
injuries.detail: Williams is currently slowed by a stress reaction in his right triceps, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Jared Thomas
injuries.detail: The Rockies announced Monday that Thomas hasn't been participating in spring training while he recovers from offseason surgery to address a fractured hamate bone in his right wrist, TheDNVR.com reports.

injuries.name: Mike Trout
injuries.detail: Trout, who was placed on the 10-day injured list earlier Thursday, said he's beginning to feel better and is hopeful it will be a short stay on the shelf, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Grayson Rodriguez
injuries.detail: Rodriguez exited Sunday's contest against Tampa Bay in the third frame due to lower-back tightness, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Travis d'Arnaud
injuries.detail: D'Arnaud (foot) is no longer wearing a walking boot, and he played catch on the field Wednesday, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Yusei Kikuchi
injuries.detail: Kikuchi (shoulder) is scheduled to begin a throwing program in mid-June, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Jorge Soler
injuries.detail: Soler (oblique) ran on the field and did some light baseball activities Friday, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Adam Frazier
injuries.detail: Frazier (elbow) took part in light baseball activities Friday, per MLB.com.

injuries.name: Ben Joyce
injuries.detail: Joyce (shoulder) threw 10 pitches off a mound Friday, Jeff Fletcher of The Orange County Register reports.

injuries.name: Jack Kochanowicz
injuries.detail: Kochanowicz (elbow) will undergo Tommy John surgery, Erica Weston of Bally Sports West reports.

injuries.name: Sebastian Rivero
injuries.detail: Rivero was removed from Tuesday's game against the Astros with an apparent left hand injury, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Yoan Moncada
injuries.detail: Moncada will require surgery on his right knee, Francys Romero of BeisbolFR.com reports.

injuries.name: Gustavo Campero
injuries.detail: The Angels selected Campero's contract from Double-A Rocket City and placed him on the 10-day injured list Saturday due to a fractured hand.

injuries.name: Robert Stephenson
injuries.detail: The Angels announced that Stephenson underwent ligament and flexor repair surgery on his right elbow Wednesday and is likely to miss the remainder of the season, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Anthony Rendon
injuries.detail: The Angels placed Rendon (hip) on the 60-day injured list Tuesday.

injuries.name: Brooks Kriske
injuries.detail: Kriske (shoulder) began a throwing progression Thursday, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Brent Rooker
injuries.detail: The Athletics placed Rooker on the 10-day injured list Friday, retroactive to Tuesday, due to a bone bruise in his left knee.

injuries.name: Luis Severino
injuries.detail: The Athletics announced Tuesday that Severino has been diagnosed with a strain of his right shoulder capsule and subscapularis muscle and will be re-evaluated in 4-to-6 weeks, Martin Gallegos of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Denzel Clarke
injuries.detail: Clarke (hamstring) will receive a platelet-rich plasma injection Tuesday, Martin Gallegos of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Gunnar Hoglund
injuries.detail: Hoglund (knee/back) will be sidelined for the rest of the 2026 season after undergoing surgery on his left hip Monday.

injuries.name: Garrett Acton
injuries.detail: Acton (shoulder) resumed throwing off a mound last week, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Ryan Jeffers
injuries.detail: Jeffers (hand) began taking dry swings June 10, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Bailey Ober
injuries.detail: Ober (elbow) is optimistic about throwing off the mound this weekend, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Mick Abel
injuries.detail: Abel (elbow) will travel with the Twins to Arizona this weekend and appears in line to return from the 15-day injured list for a start Sunday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Kendry Rojas
injuries.detail: Rojas (elbow) has been sent to Triple-A St. Paul to begin a rehab assignment, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.

injuries.name: Kaelen Culpepper
injuries.detail: Culpepper was placed on the 7-day injured list at Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday with a left hip strain, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.

injuries.name: Cole Sands
injuries.detail: Sands underwent an MRI on Friday that showed healing in his injured forearm, though inflammation was still present, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Ricardo Olivar
injuries.detail: Triple-A St. Paul transferred Olivar from the 7-day injured list to the 60-day IL on June 4 while he recovers from a right knee sprain, Twins writer Brandon Warne reports.

injuries.name: Walker Jenkins
injuries.detail: Jenkins (shoulder) could start a rehab assignment with Single-A Fort Myers as soon as Saturday, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.

injuries.name: David Festa
injuries.detail: The Twins announced June 1 that Festa (shoulder) has started a throwing progression, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Pablo Lopez
injuries.detail: The Twins placed Lopez (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Thursday.

injuries.name: Julian Merryweather
injuries.detail: Merryweather (hamstring) will begin a rehab assignment with the Twins' rookie-level Florida Complex League affiliate Tuesday, Theodore Tollefson of ZoneCoverage.com reports.

injuries.name: Matt Canterino
injuries.detail: Canterino (shoulder) will be with the Twins in big-league spring training but isn't expected to pitch during camp as he continues to recover from shoulder surgery, Aaron Gleeman of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Juan Centeno
injuries.detail: The Diamondbacks re-assigned Centeno to minor-league camp Friday.

injuries.name: James McCann
injuries.detail: McCann (quadriceps) is expected to begin playing in complex league games next week, Alex Weiner of ArizonaSports.com reports.

injuries.name: A.J. Puk
injuries.detail: The Diamondbacks paused Puk's (elbow) rehab Friday due to left shoulder discomfort, Nick Piecoro of The Arizona Republic reports.

injuries.name: Carlos Santana
injuries.detail: Santana (thigh) began a rehab assignment in the Arizona Complex League on Friday, Alex Weiner of Arizona Sports reports.

injuries.name: Corbin Burnes
injuries.detail: Manager Torey Lovullo said Wednesday that Burnes (elbow) has been shut down from throwing after suffering a teres major strain, Bob Nightengale of USA Today reports.

injuries.name: Cristian Mena
injuries.detail: Diamondbacks manager Torey Lovullo told reporters Monday that Mena underwent surgery on his right shoulder and will be sidelined for the rest of the season, Jack Sommers of SI.com reports.

injuries.name: Blake Walston
injuries.detail: Walston (elbow) paused his rehab program earlier in the season, but he was expected to start building back up around the middle of May, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: A.J. Vukovich
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Derek Law
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Justin Martinez
injuries.detail: Martinez (elbow) tossed a bullpen session Friday, Nick Piecoro of The Arizona Republic reports.

injuries.name: Andrew Saalfrank
injuries.detail: Saalfrank (shoulder) said Wednesday that he expects to be sidelined 10-16 months, Arizona Sports reports.

injuries.name: Kyle Amendt
injuries.detail: Amendt was invited to major-league spring training by the Diamondbacks, Alex Weiner of Arizona Sports reports.

injuries.name: Adley Rutschman
injuries.detail: Rutschman isn't in the lineup for Saturday's game against the Padres, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.

injuries.name: Dylan Beavers
injuries.detail: Beavers (oblique) is expected to begin a rehab assignment at Double-A Chesapeake on Thursday, Andy Kostka of TheBanner.com reports.

injuries.name: Chris Bassitt
injuries.detail: Bassitt (back) received a facet injection to his lower back Friday, and he's set to begin his throwing progression, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Dean Kremer
injuries.detail: Kremer (quadriceps) will begin a rehab assignment with Triple-A Norfolk this week, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Cade Povich
injuries.detail: Povich (elbow) will begin a minor-league rehab assignment with Double-A Chesapeake this week, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Yaramil Hiraldo
injuries.detail: Hiraldo (shoulder) will throw live batting practice Friday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Ryan Mountcastle
injuries.detail: Mountcastle (foot) did some running Saturday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.

injuries.name: Jhonkensy Noel
injuries.detail: Noel was placed on the 7-day injured list at Triple-A Norfolk on Monday with left wrist inflammation, Matt Weyrich of The Baltimore Sun reports.

injuries.name: Levi Wells
injuries.detail: Wells underwent successful core-muscle surgery Thursday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.

injuries.name: Colin Selby
injuries.detail: Selby was recently evaluated by Dr. Chris Looze in Baltimore due to ongoing symptoms with his injured right shoulder, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.

injuries.name: Jordan Westburg
injuries.detail: Westburg (elbow) underwent Tommy John surgery Wednesday, Andrew Golden of TheBanner.com reports.

injuries.name: Richard Guasch
injuries.detail: no

injuries.name: Zach Eflin
injuries.detail: Eflin underwent Tommy John surgery on his right elbow Wednesday, Andy Kostka of TheBaltimoreBanner.com reports.

injuries.name: Will Robertson
injuries.detail: The Orioles reassigned Robertson to minor-league camp Wednesday, Jacob Calvin Meyer of The Baltimore Sun reports.

injuries.name: Felix Bautista
injuries.detail: Bautista (shoulder) threw a baseball Tuesday for the first time since undergoing surgery last August, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.

injuries.name: Teoscar Hernandez
injuries.detail: Hernandez (hamstring) will take live batting practice Thursday and could be ready to begin a rehab assignment early next week, Bill Plunkett of The Orange County Register reports.

injuries.name: Will Smith
injuries.detail: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts said Wednesday that it's "unlikely" Smith (neck) will be activated from the 10-day injured list Friday when first eligible, Jack Harris of the California Post reports.

injuries.name: Tyler Glasnow
injuries.detail: Glasnow (back) has yet to resume throwing, Jack Harris of the California Post reports.

injuries.name: Edwin Diaz
injuries.detail: Diaz (elbow) is scheduled to throw a bullpen session this week, Katie Woo of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Brock Stewart
injuries.detail: Stewart (foot) will begin a rehab assignment at Single-A Ontario on Friday.

injuries.name: Kendall George
injuries.detail: George hasn't played for Double-A Tulsa since suffering an injury to his left patellar tendon in a May 25 game versus Northwest Arkansas, Alden Gonzalez of ESPN.com reports.

injuries.name: Blake Snell
injuries.detail: Snell (elbow) began playing catch Friday, Sonja Chen of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Evan Phillips
injuries.detail: Phillips (elbow) began a rehab assignment with Triple-A Oklahoma City on Thursday, yielding one hit and one walk over two-thirds of a scoreless frame.

injuries.name: Bobby Miller
injuries.detail: Miller (shoulder/back) will resume throwing off the mound this week, Cody Snavely of DodgersBeat.com reports.

injuries.name: Gavin Stone
injuries.detail: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts revealed Tuesday that Stone has been unable to ramp up his throwing without feeling soreness in his surgically repaired right shoulder, Cody Snavely of DodgersBeat.com reports.

injuries.name: Brusdar Graterol
injuries.detail: Graterol (shoulder) underwent surgery recently for a back injury he suffered while on a rehab assignment, Jack Harris of the California Post reports.

injuries.name: Enrique Hernandez
injuries.detail: Hernandez is expected to be out for 6-to-8 weeks after sustaining a "significant tear" of his left oblique during Tuesday's 15-6 win over the Rockies, Fabian Ardaya of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Ben Casparius
injuries.detail: Casparius (shoulder) was moved to the 60-day injured list Monday.

injuries.name: Landon Knack
injuries.detail: The Dodgers transferred Knack (chest) to the 60-day injured list Tuesday.

injuries.name: Jake Cousins
injuries.detail: The Dodgers transferred Cousins (elbow) from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL on Wednesday, Fabian Ardaya of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Patrick Sandoval
injuries.detail: Sandoval (biceps) went three innings, allowing one earned run on one hit and one walk while striking out four Wednesday for Double-A Portland, reports Christopher Smith of MassLive.com.

injuries.name: Romy Gonzalez
injuries.detail: Gonzalez (shoulder) went 1-for-2 with a walk and a two-run home run for Double-A Portland on Tuesday.

injuries.name: Roman Anthony
injuries.detail: Anthony (finger) underwent a follow-up MRI on Tuesday that came back clean, but he's not yet cleared to swing a bat, Gabrielle Starr of the Boston Herald reports.

injuries.name: Garrett Crochet
injuries.detail: Crochet (shoulder/lat) began throwing a plyometric ball Tuesday as the first step of his throwing program, Jen McCaffrey of The Athletic reports.

injuries.name: Noah Song
injuries.detail: Song (elbow) was reinstated from Double-A Portland's 7-day injured list Friday and made his 2025 debut for the affiliate in relief Sunday, striking out one and issuing one walk over a scoreless inning.

injuries.name: Nick Sogard
injuries.detail: Sogard (oblique) told reporters Friday that he plans to start swinging a bat Monday, Gabrielle Starr of the Boston Herald reports.

injuries.name: Jovani Moran
injuries.detail: The Red Sox placed Moran on the 15-day injured list Saturday, retroactive to Friday, with left elbow inflammation, Tim Healey of The Boston Globe reports.

injuries.name: Trevor Story
injuries.detail: Story underwent surgery to repair a sports hernia Thursday and will be sidelined 6-10 weeks, Tim Healey of The Boston Globe reports.

injuries.name: Kutter Crawford
injuries.detail: Interim manager Chad Tracy said Tuesday that Crawford (elbow) is dealing with moderate tightness in his right forearm, Christopher Smith of MassLive.com reports.

injuries.name: Triston Casas
injuries.detail: Red Sox interim manager Chad Tracy told reporters Wednesday that Casas (abdomen/knee) is close to being cleared to swing a bat, Christopher Smith of MassLive.com reports.

injuries.name: Tanner Houck
injuries.detail: Houck (elbow) has been making throws out to 105 feet three days per week, MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Hobie Harris
injuries.detail: Harris was optioned to Triple-A Rochester on Saturday, Jesse Dougherty of The Washington Post reports.

injuries.name: Brendan Rodgers
injuries.detail: Rodgers (shoulder) re-signed Friday with the Red Sox on a two-year, minor-league contract, Chris Hatfield of SoxProspects.com reports.

injuries.name: Johan Oviedo
injuries.detail: Oviedo (elbow) will be reevaluated by Dr. Keith Meister in two weeks to determine his progress, Marcos Grunfeld of ElEmergente.com reports.

injuries.name: Julio Rodriguez
injuries.detail: Rodriguez (hamstring) isn't in the lineup for Thursday's game against Baltimore.

injuries.name: Luke Raley
injuries.detail: Raley isn't in the lineup for Thursday's game against the Orioles due to the flu, Daniel Kramer of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Carlos Vargas
injuries.detail: Mariners general manager Justin Hollander said Tuesday that Vargas (lat) recently began a throwing program and could be ready to return from the 60-day injured list around the Aug. 3 trade deadline, Zac Hereth of 710 AM Seattle Sports reports.

injuries.name: Will Wilson
injuries.detail: Wilson (thumb) has gone 3-for-9 with two RBI and a 1:2 BB:K in his first three rehab games between High-A Everett and Triple-A Tacoma.

injuries.name: Randy Arozarena
injuries.detail: Arozarena (hamstring) isn't in the lineup for Tuesday's game against the Orioles, Ryan Divish of The Seattle Times reports.

injuries.name: Cooper Criswell
injuries.detail: Criswell was diagnosed with a Grade 1-plus pectoral strain Tuesday, Daniel Kramer of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Brendan Donovan
injuries.detail: Donovan (groin) began a running progression Tuesday, Daniel Kramer of MLB.com reports.

injuries.name: Matt Brash
injuries.detail: General manager Justin Hollander said Tuesday that Brash was diagnosed with a Grade 1 strain in his right lat, Shannon Drayer of SeattleSports.com reports.

injuries.name: Dane Dunning
injuries.detail: The Mariners signed Dunning to a minor-league contract Thursday, Chris Cotillo of MassLive.com reports.

injuries.name: Logan Evans
injuries.detail: The Mariners placed Evans (elbow) on the 60-day injured list Monday.
